name: QA 279
description:
PCP QA Test No. 279

Check recovery actions when procedures in pmdaproc.sh fail to

restart/start PMCD



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.

PCP QA Test No. 279

Check recovery actions when procedures in pmdaproc.sh fail to

restart/start PMCD
